title: Better Looking Torches
description: Changes the torch & soul torch models to the redstone torch model, and also changes the textures of each torch item
body:
This resource pack changes all the torch models to look like the new redstone torch models
![All 4 torch models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a1fe3522a71899666f9bd44d12d12943f54a3e8.png)

It also changes the torch sprites to a mix between the old and new redstone torch sprite
![All 4 torch sprites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8bf1baa1ec1af7cde19915309231898a43fbdfe.png)
